title: Scenes Web — Lifecycle & Management Actions Design
summary: Technical design for exposing scene lifecycle and management verbs (end/pause/resume, invite/kick/transfer, publish voting) to the web client via a typed BFF facade, closing an authorization gap in SceneService RPC handlers.
scope: scene lifecycle verbs (EndScene, PauseScene, ResumeScene, UpdateScene)
scene membership verbs (InviteToScene, KickFromScene, TransferOwnership, LeaveScene)
